title: v0.6.2 CDN/Xet CSP hotfix release publication checklist
preTagChecks: Release-prep PR merges to clean main.
Required CI checks pass on the release-prep PR and clean main commit.
Static validation confirms v0.6.2 release notes/checklist and v0.6.0/v0.6.1 immutability wording.
Full local validation passes: pnpm lint && pnpm format-check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm chromium-smoke.
publicationSteps: Create annotated tag v0.6.2 from clean main after CI passes.
Generate web dist archive from tagged commit: speech-web-v0.6.2-dist.tar.gz.
Create GitHub release v0.6.2 with notes that preserve #255, ADR 0004, and ADR 0005 limitations.
Verify production Vercel deployment for the tagged release commit.
Verify direct-route headers include `connect-src 'self' https://huggingface.co https://us.aws.cdn.hf.co` and that model lifecycle worker fetch is not CSP-blocked by the Hugging Face CDN redirect.
Close issue #314 only after GitHub release and deployment verification evidence are recorded.
Do not close issue #255 unless participant evidence or an explicit separate human decision updates that issue.
